channel.title: Protein Design Podcast
channel.description: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research
channel.itunes:author: Eva Dai
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-02
item.description: Researchers have developed a diverse database and machine learning model to narrow the generalization gap in RNA structure prediction. | Voltage-gated sodium channels are essential for electrical signaling in nerve and muscle cells, making them prime targets for treating conditions like epilepsy and chronic pain. | A new review in Protein Expression and Purification explores the diverse host systems used to produce recombinant antibody reagents for immunological assays.
item.itunes:author: Eva Dai
item.itunes:summary: Researchers have developed a diverse database and machine learning model to narrow the generalization gap in RNA structure prediction. | Voltage-gated sodium channels are essential for electrical signaling in nerve and muscle cells, making them prime targets for treating conditions like epilepsy and chronic pain. | A new review in Protein Expression and Purification explores the diverse host systems used to produce recombinant antibody reagents for immunological assays.
